h20605216g8407g4fc4ga6f8ga2adbf0311e5: Olly was a decent lad. Pained me to cut on him like that.
h1caf9d48g302dg434agbf16g59d565c0c12c: See my handiwork? He started squealing before the knives came out, truth be told. But it pays to be thorough.
h0b54c855g97d3g415egbb05g6b35ff71e95d: You look like a bad enemy to have - glad I won't have to find out.
hf50bc662g1a44g4f0agbf74g938f504ab3cc: You seem a nice sort - I'm glad we didn't have to kill you.
ha7080cf3g0fc4g46bcgaed3g3d55f2743d56: Flaming Fist crawling above and the Underdark waiting below. Don't know which I like less.
